query: ("weather forecast"[Title/Abstract] OR "temperature forecast"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat forecast"[Title/Abstract] OR "early warning system"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat warning"[Title/Abstract] OR "weather alert"[Title/Abstract] OR "meteorological forecast"[Title/Abstract] OR "temperature prediction"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat advisory"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat index"[Title/Abstract] OR "weather information"[Title/Abstract] OR "climate information"[Title/Abstract]) AND ("cooling center"[Title/Abstract] OR "cooling shelter"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat refuge"[Title/Abstract] OR "cooling station"[Title/Abstract] OR "air conditioning center"[Title/Abstract] OR "emergency shelter"[Title/Abstract] OR "public cooling"[Title/Abstract] OR "community cooling"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat relief"[Title/Abstract]) AND ("temperature-mortality"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat-mortality"[Title/Abstract] OR "temperature-health"[Title/Abstract] OR "thermal stress"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat-related death"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat-related illness"[Title/Abstract] OR hyperthermia[Title/Abstract] OR "heat stroke"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat exhaustion"[Title/Abstract] OR "excess mortality"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat wave mortality"[Title/Abstract]) AND ("randomized controlled trial"[Title/Abstract] OR "quasi-experimental"[Title/Abstract] OR "natural experiment"[Title/Abstract] OR "regression discontinuity"[Title/Abstract] OR "difference-in-difference"[Title/Abstract] OR "instrumental variable"[Title/Abstract] OR "causal inference"[Title/Abstract] OR "plausibly exogenous"[Title/Abstract] OR "random assignment"[Title/Abstract] OR "controlled study"[Title/Abstract] OR "intervention study"[Title/Abstract] OR "evaluation study"[Title/Abstract] OR "impact assessment"[Title/Abstract] OR "policy evaluation"[Title/Abstract])
